prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model for stock price movements. This model assumes prices follow a log-normal distribution. The current price of $70.72 is used as the starting point. A daily drift (average return) of 0.05% (0.0005) and an estimated daily volatility of 2.5% (derived from an annualized volatility of approximately 40%) were applied over the 3-day period. The point estimate incorporates this slight positive drift, while the confidence intervals are calculated using standard Z-scores for each confidence level to reflect the expected price range given the estimated volatility.
